artist.name: VELOUR
artist.genre: Melodic techno · Berlin / Los Angeles · Est. 2021

bio.short: VELOUR is a Los Angeles-based melodic techno and progressive house producer crafting dense, emotional club music since 2021. Drawing from post-punk and ambient influences, her sets move between hypnotic percussion and soaring synth atmospheres.
bio.long: Following a debut EP on Berlin's Subtext Collective, VELOUR has played b2b sets at Avalon Hollywood, Club Bizarre, and Berlin's OHM. Her track "Dawnbreak" was featured on Spotify's Electronic Rising playlist.

press.quote: A future-focused sound that balances raw energy with genuine emotional depth.
VELOUR's Dawnbreak is one of the most assured debut singles of the year.
